## PiWsConfig.piHooks property

Optional hooks for the built-in Pi WebSocket route at `${wsPrefix}/pi`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly piHooks?: PiWsHooks<Session>;
```

## Remarks

This protects the default Pi bridge route only. Use `protectHttpHandler()` or `protectWebSocketBehavior()` for your own custom routes.
